chain.thought: Explanation: Anders Theil served from 7 November 2005 to 7 July 2009, which is about 3 years and 8 months. Ebbe Skovdahl served from 11 October 2003 to 6 November 2005, which is about 2 years and 26 days. Therefore, Anders Theil served longer.
